calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment/Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default judgment/prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:38:48 a.m. and concluding at 10:06:37 a.m.

Plaintiff Michael Niland, an Individual and as Trustee of the Michael J. Niland Trust appearing represented by Evan M. Rosenbaum, Esq.
Defendant James Zhang not appearing.

MICHAEL NILAND is placed under oath on behalf of Plaintiff.
Counsel for Plaintiff presents an offer of proof.

Court is in receipt of page Declaration electronically filed Dec-06-2022 by Defendant James Zhang. Court reviews said document.
Court determines that Defendant is not present in person nor, via Zoom Video Conference. Default was entered against James Zhang and Brown Bunny, LLC on Oct-17-2022. There is no request to vacate default pending. Court proceeds with hearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff is examined by the Court re: damages and calculation of interest.
Declaration of Michael Niland in Support of Motion and Motion for Default Judgment/Prove Up Hearing filed Oct-19-2022 is ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE.

The following exhibit is MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit A - Copy of Lease

Court examines MICHAEL NILAND.
Court further examines Plaintiff's counsel regarding attorney fees.

The matter is submitted.
Plantiff has proven Defendant's breach of rental lease agreement.

Court does not consider Declaration filed by Defendant James Zhang on Dec-06-2022.
Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Michael Niland, an Individual and as Trustee of the Michael J. Niland Trust, and against Defendant James Zhang and Brown Bunny, LLC, as follows:

Principal: $68,520.00
Attorney Fees: $6,420.00
Costs: $868.05

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $78,808.05

Plaintiff's request for interest and late charges is DENIED.
Court finds in sufficient evidence to support request for taxes, interest, and insurance. Late charges are exorbitant.

Proposed judgment signed as modified.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2022 Continued To Feb-01-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2022 Continued To Oct-26-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
